description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Unit tests that runs on every push to master, main, develop, bugfix, feature, fix, and pr branches, as well as on pull requests. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to test on various Linux and macOS environments with different compilers, C++ standards, and Boost versions. It checks out the repository, sets up the environment, compiles and installs dependencies, builds the project, and runs tests, with optional coverage collection and upload to Coveralls.
